creator: skh1002@hotmail.com
text:
Trying to build nginx-devel v1.11.10 on FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p8, I get a Makefile error:

===>>> Dependency check complete for www/nginx-devel

===>  Cleaning for nginx-devel-1.11.10
===>  nginx-devel-1.11.10 HTTP_ZIP: a patch requires.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/nginx-devel

===>>> make build failed for www/nginx-devel
===>>> Aborting update


Building nginx-devel v1.11.9_1 was successful.
